mapper.select: SELECT reservation.id as id, reservation.user_id as user_id, reservation.store_id as store_id, reservation.room_id as room_id, reservation.start_time as start_time, reservation.end_time as end_time, reservation.status as status, reservation.create_time as create_time, room.room_name AS remark1 FROM reservation left join room on reservation.room_id = room.id WHERE reservation.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY reservation.create_time DESC
